meaning: n.保管人,受托人,受托公司,存放处,储藏所,仓库
examples: A bare trustee is a mere passive depositary.
Tudou has sold six million American depositary shares so far.
The company also has American depositary receipts that trade on the New York Stock Exchange.
All 125 are either listed on U.S. exchanges or traded as American Depositary Receipts.
Australian shares traded here as American Depositary Receipts are limited to a selection of 100 issues.
